data.name: Sex Lens: A Porn Story 🍓🎥
data.detailed_description:
Sex Lens: A Porn Story 🍓🎥 is a visual novel that places the keys to an intriguing cinematic world in your hands. Explore the world of a massive cinematic business where you, as the owner of an adult studio, set the rules of the game.

Develop your studio, turning it into an empire for adults with its own style and defined values. Your decisions in dialogues affect relationships with actresses, opening up new possibilities for better stories and films.

Travel the world of the game, selecting exclusive shooting locations, and immerse yourself in exciting events that shape the narrative of your cinematic universe.

This is a visual novel that places the keys to an intriguing cinematic world in your hands. You have the opportunity to participate in a luxurious and creative process, but be prepared for challenges that present you with difficult choices and determine your success in this industry.

Sex Lens: A Porn Story 🍓🎥 is not just a game; it's an opportunity to become a true director of your success in the adult industry. Get ready for exciting challenges, creative solutions, and an infinite world of cinema!

Features:
  • Plenty of lewd scenes with various girls
  • Fast-paced and intuitive gameplay
  • A fascinating story
  • A Multitude of Sexy Situations
  • Explicit content and mature themes, suitable only for players 18 years and older
  • Ability to play with one hand. ( ͡~ ͜ʖ ͡°)

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯文, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
